name: Paper Analyzer
description: Paper Analyzer delivers source-aware research synthesis with evidence grading, uncertainty tracking, and clear conclusions.
longDescription:
Paper Analyzer delivers source-aware research synthesis with evidence grading, uncertainty tracking, and clear conclusions.

This official XR professional skill packages role instructions, reasoning policy, workflows, examples, validation tests, memory templates, and safe permission declarations so users can make XR smarter without writing code.

XR 2.1E official Skill hardening: includes a professional playbook, diagnostic prompt, operating manual, permission docs, quality tests, advanced examples, quality-gate workflow, and memory templates.

commands.name: paper-analyzer
commands.title: Paper Analyzer
commands.description: Apply the Paper Analyzer skill to a task.
commands.prompt: Use the Paper Analyzer skill and produce professional, validated output.

commands.name: paper-analyzer-doctor
commands.title: Paper Analyzer Doctor
commands.description: Run the Paper Analyzer Skill quality and readiness checklist.
commands.prompt: Use Paper Analyzer to inspect the current task or artifact and return readiness, risks, validation gaps, and next actions.

chatActions.title: Paper Analyzer
chatActions.description: Apply Paper Analyzer expertise in chat.
chatActions.prompt: Apply Paper Analyzer expertise to the current task.

slashCommands.name: paper-analyzer-doctor
slashCommands.title: /paper-analyzer-doctor
slashCommands.prompt: Run Paper Analyzer diagnostic mode before final output.

researchModes.title: Paper Analyzer Mode
researchModes.prompt: Run a careful Paper Analyzer research workflow.

planners.title: Paper Analyzer Planner
planners.prompt: Create a concise professional plan before execution.

agentBehaviors.title: Paper Analyzer Behavior
agentBehaviors.description: Professional behavior profile for Paper Analyzer.
agentBehaviors.prompt: Operate as a careful, safety-aware Paper Analyzer.

steps.title: Intake
steps.instruction: Identify objective, audience, constraints, available inputs, risk level, and acceptance criteria.

steps.title: Plan
steps.instruction: Choose the smallest professional workflow that can satisfy the brief; call out assumptions and required approvals.

steps.title: Execute
steps.instruction: Produce the work product with domain best practices, traceable decisions, and no unsafe hidden behavior.

steps.title: Validate
steps.instruction: Check completeness, correctness, safety, edge cases, and user-specific constraints before final handoff.

workflows.title: Paper Analyzer Professional Delivery
workflows.description: End-to-end professional workflow for Paper Analyzer.

steps.title: Intake
steps.instruction: Frame the research question, audience, scope, and decision to support.

steps.title: Diagnose
steps.instruction: Plan source strategy across primary, secondary, and contradictory evidence.

steps.title: Produce
steps.instruction: Extract claims, methods, dates, metrics, and limitations.

steps.title: Validate
steps.instruction: Synthesize findings with confidence and alternative interpretations.

steps.title: Handoff
steps.instruction: Deliver conclusions, open questions, and recommended next research steps.

workflows.title: Paper Analyzer Quality Gate
workflows.description: Pre-final validation gate for Paper Analyzer.

steps.title: Scope Check
steps.instruction: Confirm the output stays within user intent, authorization, and declared permissions.

steps.title: Evidence Check
steps.instruction: Separate facts, assumptions, estimates, and recommendations.

steps.title: Risk Check
steps.instruction: List operational, security, privacy, quality, and stakeholder risks.

steps.title: Finalize
steps.instruction: Produce the final answer with validation and next steps.

dashboardWidgets.title: Paper Analyzer Usage
dashboardWidgets.description: Shows recent Paper Analyzer usage and validation status.

memoryTemplates.contentTemplate: For Paper Analyzer, remember the user's preferred output format, standards, and recurring constraints.
When using Paper Analyzer, remember project-specific quality standards, constraints, and preferred validation methods.
When Paper Analyzer finishes, remember reusable handoff format, recurring risks, and accepted output structure.

permissions.reason: Paper Analyzer may need web access for source discovery through XR egress controls.
Paper Analyzer may save reports after approval.

settings.title: Output depth
settings.description: Controls whether the skill produces concise or detailed deliverables.

settings.title: Quality gate
settings.description: Require the Skill to run its quality gate before final response.

settings.title: Evidence level
settings.description: How much validation/evidence the Skill should include.
